subject: UX & Research
title: The Hidden Shipping Cost Trap
description: One-minute skill: The Hidden Shipping Cost Trap.

hook.text: A user adds items to cart, reaches checkout, and discovers a $15 shipping fee. They abandon the cart.

buildup.text: Baymard Institute found that unexpected shipping costs are the number one reason for cart abandonment at 48%.

discovery.text: Amazon solved this with Prime: pay upfront for free shipping forever. The surprise cost becomes zero.

twist.text: Some stores added shipping to the product price instead. Same total, but zero surprise. Abandonment dropped.

climax.text: Transparency about total cost from the start prevents abandonment. No one likes surprise fees at the finish line.

punchline.text: Show the real price early. Surprises at checkout kill sales.

quiz.question: What is the top reason for cart abandonment in e-commerce?
options: Unexpected shipping costs revealed at checkout
